ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator of the resource (author, editor, etc.) */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the resource */,
  "publication_year" TEXT /* Year of publication */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., book, journal) */,
  "subjects" TEXT /* Subjects associated with the resource */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the resource */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the resource */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the resource */,
  "ISBN" TEXT /* ISBN of the resource */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the resource */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the resource (e.g., hardcover, paperback, e-book, audiobook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patrons" (
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patron */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patron */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patron */,
  "membership_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., regular, premium) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patron */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patron */,
  "library_card_number" TEXT /* Library card number of the patron */,
  "patron_type" TEXT /* Type of patron (e.g., adult, child, student) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "checkouts" (
  "checkout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each checkout transaction */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource being checked out */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patron checking out the resource */,
  "checkout_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was checked out */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was returned */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the resource is due */,
  "checkout_type" TEXT /* Type of checkout (e.g., Horizon) */,
  "checkout_year" INTEGER /* Year of the checkout */,
  "checkout_month" INTEGER /* Month of the checkout */,
  "checkouts" INTEGER /* Total number of checkouts for the resource in the specified month */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library branch where the resource was checked out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("checkout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkouts_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkouts_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkouts_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patron who made the reservation */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource reserved */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date the reservation was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "status_update_date" TEXT /* Date the reservation status was last updated */,
  "expected_availability_date" TEXT /* Expected date the resource will be available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holds" (
  "hold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hold */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patron who placed the hold */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource on hold */,
  "hold_date" TEXT /* Date the hold was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the hold (e.g., active, fulfilled) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the hold will expire */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the hold (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holds_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holds_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fines" (
  "fine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fine */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patron associated with the fine */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource associated with the fine */,
  "amount" REAL /* Fine amount in dollars */,
  "fine_date" TEXT /* Date the fine was issued */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fine (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "fine_type" TEXT /* Type of fine (e.g., late fee, lost item fee) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the fine was paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fines_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fines_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patron who submitted the review */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the patron (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "helpfulness_rating" TEXT /* Helpfulness rating of the review (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analytics record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource for which analytics are tracked */,
  "checkout_count" INTEGER /* Total number of checkouts for the resource */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the resource based on reviews */,
  "total_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings for the resource */,
  "rating_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ratings for the resource (e.g., 1-star, 2-star, etc.) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "library_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., librarian, assistant) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the staff member */,
  "supervisor" TEXT /* Supervisor of the staff member */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the staff member (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the branch */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the branch */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the branch */,
  "hours_of_operation" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the branch */,
  "branch_type" TEXT /* Type of branch (e.g., main, branch, outreach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)
